prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The crew log for U-202 Pipe bedding & backfill shows the required preparatory steps finished before the current operation. Hold points are signed, materials are staged in order, and no skipped step is visible in the photo set. Source anchors for review: project specs, IPC 306.
title: T1 U-202 Compliant Procedure sequencing
